name: Beans with Thyme & Cashew Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the green beans.
2. Bring a large pot of water to boil. Add salt and slice beans. Boil the beans in lightly salted water until they are just tender. Drain them.
3. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Put cashews in the skillet and stir until golden brown. Remove from the skillet.
4. Increase the heat under the skillet. Add beans and garlic. Stir until the garlic begins to brown.
5. Mix in the nuts and thyme. Serve immediately.
